testFuzz_ownerManagement_works(uint256,u.notice: Tests that the guard correctly manages the lastLive mapping when owners are added,         removed, or swapped.

test_removeOwner_succeeds().notice: Tests that the guard correctly deletes the owner from the lastLive mapping when it         is removed.

test_swapOwner_succeeds().notice: Tests that the guard correctly adds an owner to the lastLive mapping when it is         added.
